---
title: "draft using master function"
format: dashboard
editor: visual
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| label: setup

source("R/setup.R")
source("R/masterfunction.R")

pertussis_report <- build_disease_report(
  data = fake_cases_clean,
  disease_name = "Pertussis"
)
```

## Overview

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Cases"
list(
  value = pertussis_report$total_cases,
  icon = "clipboard2-pulse"
)
```

## Time Trends

```{r}
pertussis_report$weekly_plot
```

## Demographics

### Age

```{r}
pertussis_report$age_plot
```

### Sex

```{r}
pertussis_report$sex_plot
```
